fields.program_name: Master of Science in Artificial Intelligence
fields.tuition: The tuition fee is HK$390,000* for students admitted in September 2026. The fee shall normally be payable in three instalments over 1.5 years for full-time study.
fields.academic_requirement: Applicants shall hold a Bachelor's degree or an equivalent qualification.
